general_info.definition: Fluorescent carbon dots used with rare-earth ions to form NaYF4:Eu@CDs nanocomposites

method.conditions: precursors mixed with 10ml of water and placed into a beaker and stirred for 15min. Slowly transferred to a 50 mL Teflonlined stainless autoclave and heated at 180ºC for 12 h.

source: 10 mL of N-(b-aminoethyl)-c-aminopropyl methyldi methoxy silane (AEAPMS)

post_treatment: Extraction with ethyl acetate and petroleum ether

structural.crystallinity: lattice fringe of 0.21nm can be indexed to the interplanar spacing of (100) planes for graphitic carbon

applications.performance: Selective detection of Fe3+-dependent emission in spectra of NaYF4:Eu@CDs via CDs' fluorescence quenching. Linear range: 0-350 µM with 395nm excitation. Luminescent intensities of NaYF4:Eu@CDs defined by using the ratio of the intensity of CDs at 460nm and that of NaYF4:Eu at 612nm(F460/F612) is given by (F460/F612) = 1.89779 - 0.12945 C where C represents the concentration which varies from 0 to 350 µM.
applications.comparative_advantage: Ratiometric sensing enabled. Reliable and useful ion probe based on the dual-emissive NaYF4:Eu@CDs

applications.performance: NaYF4:Eu@CDs nanocomposite used as a ratiometric thermometer from 377 K to 467 K with an interval of 10K at the excitation of 395 nm due to the two emissions of CDs and NaYF4:Eu at different temperatures. Intensity ratio of NaYF4:Eu at 614 nm to that of CDs at 471nm (F614/F471) is given by (F614/F471)=0.05764T- 20.935 where T represents the temperature in the range of 377 to 467K.
applications.comparative_advantage: Dual-emission allows internal calibration, improving accuracy over single-emission probes.

applications.performance: NaYF4:Eu@CDs nanocomposite (mass ratio 5:1) combined with 395 nm UV-LED chip produces white light with CIE coordinates (0.293, 0.281).
applications.comparative_advantage: Color tunable from blue to red by adjusting NaYF4:Eu-to-CDs mass ratio; solid-state fluorescence without quenching.

feedback.label: Bad
feedback.expert_comment: Incomplete Structure: The entire section 'carbon_dots -> properties -> optical' was incorrectly omitted. The JSON is missing a mandatory structural block.
